General.Name: Topsports International Holding Ltd
General.Description: Topsports International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of sportswear products in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the leasing commercial spaces to other retailers for concessionaire sale; provision of information technology, media communication, and marketing services; operation of sports cities business. It sells its products through retail outlets, e-commerce platform, and wholesalers. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
General.Address: M1, The Edge, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
